'''Obinipor''' was an unaligned [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], near [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s territory. Its volcanoes spewed out metals used to fabricate [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]].

{{Planet-stub}}
